text:
Analysis (, rom. Anarishisu) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to read the text of a numbered card of their choice, except for #000.
__NOTOC__

Card Info

| colspan="3" align="center" |Long Range Regular Spell
|

!Card Effect:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Show explanation on card of the chosen number (not available to No. 000).
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Purchasable at the Spell Card Shop in Masadora.
|
|}

Summary

This spell allows the caster to read the text of a numbered item card (so a specified slot card between #1 and #99) of their choice, and thus to figure out its effects. This implies that the target card's number must be known to cast this spell.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1031 :: 
指定した番号のアイテムカードの説明を見ることができる。（Ｎｏ．０００を除く）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1031 :: Analysis 
A specific numbered item cards' explanation is able to be seen. (Except No.000)
|}

Greed Island Perfect Collectable Set

 
Greed Island Perfect Collection Box Interior.png
 

Trivia

Shalnark mentioned this card in Chapter 134 as one of the two cards the Phantom Troupe had to focus on obtaining first.
It was also cited in Chapter 151 by Kazsule.
